# CWE-547 negative: signing key loaded from environment (pure stdlib)
lang: go
file: CWE-547-safe.pure.go
variant: pure-go
---
package sample

import (
	"crypto/hmac"
	"crypto/sha256"
	"encoding/hex"
	"net/http"
	"os"
)

func IssueSessionCookie(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
	secret := os.Getenv("SESSION_MAC_KEY")
	if secret == "" {
		http.Error(w, "misconfigured", http.StatusInternalServerError)
		return
	}
	uid := r.Header.Get("X-UID")
	mac := hmac.New(sha256.New, []byte(secret))
	mac.Write([]byte(uid))
	token := hex.EncodeToString(mac.Sum(nil))
	http.SetCookie(w, &http.Cookie{Name: "session", Value: token})
	w.WriteHeader(http.StatusOK)
}
